chain.thought: Explanation: Sum the second number in the results column for each non-TBA year (India’s tally): 1 (1978) + 1 (1981) + 2 (1986) + 2 (1988) + 3 (1998) + 3 (1999) + 2 (2004) + 1 (2006) = 15.
